/home/runner/work/eckit/.codeql-scratch/dbs/cpp/working/autobuild/bin/c++ -fPIC  -pipe -Wall -Wextra -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -Wno-sign-compare -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/eckit_geo.dir/link.d  -Wl,--disable-new-dtags -shared -Wl,-soname,libeckit_geo.so -o ../../../lib/libeckit_geo.so CMakeFiles/eckit_geo.dir/Area.cc.o
